task: Task 5: Lightweight chemical process diagram node-arrow-parameter parsing
keep_signals: Contains chemical reaction schemes, PFD/P&ID drawings, chemistry apparatus, chemical structures, reaction conditions, process equipment, pipelines, arrows, or machine-readable graph/connectivity annotations.
Can map source annotations to node-edge-parameter graph fields.
Has enough label structure to support object detection, arrow/line detection, OCR parameter extraction, or graph recovery.
License/access allows research use or at least reproducible benchmarking after documented access.
drop_signals: General scientific diagrams with no chemical/process subset or no usable object-arrow-text annotation.
P&ID-only data that cannot be legally accessed or whose annotations do not include equipment/line/connectivity fields.
Images without annotation, source provenance, or clear permission for research use.
Samples that are unreadable, duplicated, missing image files, or cannot be mapped to the target graph schema.

datasets.name: RxnScribe
datasets.license: MIT for code repository; verify dataset/model terms on Hugging Face before redistribution
datasets.scale_note: Reaction diagrams, ground truth under data/parse/splits, five-fold cross-validation splits
datasets.annotation_shape: reactants, conditions, products with bounding boxes, OCR text, SMILES/molfile when recognized
datasets.cleaning_rule: Keep reaction diagrams with complete image and ground-truth split records; map reactants/products to nodes, reaction arrows to directed edges, and conditions text to parameters.
datasets.known_limitations: Not an industrial PFD/P&ID dataset; equipment such as pump, valve, vessel is mostly absent.
datasets.next_actions: Download images.zip only when storage permits; parse data/parse/splits into graph JSONL; audit OCR condition quality.

datasets.name: ReactionDataExtractor2
datasets.scale_note: Toolkit and model weights; not primarily a standalone curated dataset
datasets.annotation_shape: Detected nodes and adjacency dictionary for reaction scheme entities; arrows, conditions, diagrams, labels
datasets.cleaning_rule: Use as a baseline and schema normalizer; keep only outputs generated from chemical reaction scheme images with valid node list and adjacency dictionary.
datasets.known_limitations: Still reaction scheme oriented; dependency and model-weight setup is heavier than a pure dataset.
datasets.next_actions: Install in isolated environment if needed; run on a small RxnScribe/own sample batch and normalize outputs to task5_graph_schema.json.

datasets.name: AI2D
datasets.license: Check AI2D terms before redistribution; dataset is hosted by AllenAI
datasets.scale_note: 4,903 images, 4,563 questions, 4,903 annotations; all package about 945MB
datasets.annotation_shape: Object segmentations, diagrammatic elements, text elements, question-answer annotations
datasets.cleaning_rule: Keep only samples whose labels/text indicate chemistry, process, flow, reaction, heat, gas, liquid, apparatus, or arrow-rich scientific diagrams; otherwise use as generic pretraining only.
datasets.known_limitations: Not a chemical engineering dataset and lacks typical process equipment symbols.
datasets.next_actions: After download, keyword-filter annotations/text; sample 100 diagrams to estimate chemistry subset size before full conversion.

datasets.name: PID_dataset
datasets.scale_note: PID_Dataset.zip, 6,685,294,325 bytes; industrial and web-scraped P&IDs
datasets.annotation_shape: P&ID images plus code/weights according to record; inspect archive for exact labels before model training
datasets.cleaning_rule: Keep equipment, valve, vessel, instrument, and pipeline samples after license/provenance review; downsample for light process diagram transfer.
datasets.known_limitations: Large archive and full P&ID complexity may overwhelm a lightweight optional task.
datasets.next_actions: Do not download by default; first reserve storage, download checksum-verified archive, then sample 50 drawings for symbol taxonomy mapping.

datasets.name: Dataset-P&ID / Digitize-PID
datasets.license: Original Google Drive terms need verification; derived Hugging Face mirrors vary
datasets.scale_note: Paper reports 500 annotated synthetic P&IDs with noise and complex symbols
datasets.annotation_shape: Object detection style symbol labels; public mirrors often provide YOLO or imagefolder variants
datasets.cleaning_rule: Keep synthetic P&ID images with symbol boxes; map symbols to task equipment nodes and infer line/edge data only if annotation is present.
datasets.known_limitations: Often symbol-only, so node-edge graph recovery may require added line/connectivity annotation.
datasets.next_actions: Prefer original Drive or a documented Hugging Face mirror; verify symbol class list and train/val split before ingestion.

datasets.name: PIDCon
datasets.license: No explicit repository license found as of audit; confirm before redistribution
datasets.scale_note: 600 P&ID images, 82 component classes, 7,212 component connection pairs
datasets.cleaning_rule: Keep all accessible images with box-line-connection-path annotations; convert directly to node-edge graph and evaluate GED/NCA.
datasets.known_limitations: More engineering-heavy than lightweight diagrams; download is via Baidu Disk and license is unclear.
datasets.next_actions: Confirm access and license; normalize boxes, lines, connections, and paths into task5_graph_schema.json.
